beats: The wooden board is lifted. Cold wind rises from the dark hole, carrying a damp, rusty smell.

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: 木板掀开，冷风从黑洞里爬出来，带着潮湿的铁锈味。

prompt.positive: Close-up of a dark hole in the floor, cold mist rising, wooden board partially lifted, damp rusty atmosphere, low-key lighting, cinematic depth, eerie blue-gray tones.
